title: Top Regenerative Agriculture YouTube Channels
description: 21-channel regenerative agriculture leaderboard (fetched 2026-07-12): subscriber counts, video totals, public-contact stats.
answer_first: This July 12, 2026 ranking covers 21 regenerative agriculture channels with a combined 278,350 subscribers. JADAM Organic Farm & Garden leads on 120,000; the median sits at 3,760, and 11 of 21 channels list a public business contact. Snapshot number 1 landed 2026-07-12 with 21 channels; week-over-week changes start with the next refresh. The channel-by-channel table - subscribers, videos, country, public contact - follows.
rows: Cliff Honnas Regenerative Rancher & Equine Surgeon
OSU Plant and Soil Sciences - Extension and Teaching
facts: Combined audience: 278,350 subscribers across the 21 ranked channels (2026-07-12).
Subscribers range up to 120,000 (JADAM Organic Farm & Garden); the median channel counts 3,760.
11 of 21 ranked channels advertise a public business contact (aggregate only - no addresses shown).
3,672 videos have been published across all 21 ranked channels.
More channels are based in United States than anywhere else - 10 of 21.
Dataset baseline: 21 channels at first capture on 2026-07-12.

faq.a: By automated keyword discovery for 'regenerative agriculture' during the 2026-07-12 run - no manual curation. Every one of the 21 channels shown carries its public subscriber, video, and country data.

faq.q: Why are there no email addresses in the table?
faq.a: By design - the table shows a yes/no public-contact flag and nothing more (11 of 21 say yes). Address-level data is left to the source actor, which only returns what creators publish.

faq.q: How spread out are the subscriber counts?
faq.a: Widely: from 120,000 at the top down past a median of 3,760 across 21 channels. The ranking table shows the full curve.

faq.q: Is this snapshot or live data?
faq.a: It is a dated snapshot from 2026-07-12 of live public counts, covering 21 channels. The page is rebuilt on a schedule, so the URL stays stable while numbers update.
